title: Harbor Break Run Cinematic Pursuit
description: A highly structured, multi-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 detailing a 15-second cinematic pursuit sequence in an industrial harbor setting. It specifies the format, style (Industrial harbor at blue hour, photoreal 35mm), and six distinct shots, including an aerial drop, low tracking, a swerve around a truck, scraping a barrier, and a final exit into the skyline.
content: Harbor Break Run FORMAT: 15s / 6 SHOTS / grounded cinematic pursuit / no dialogue STYLE: Industrial harbor at blue hour, wet concrete, sodium-vapor lamps, soft fog, practical lens flares, restrained color palette, photoreal 35mm Shot 01 (0:00-0:02) A slow aerial drop into a working harbor reveals a single matte-black speeder blasting along a rain-dark service road between stacked containers and cranes. Shot 02 (0:02-0:04) The camera settles low behind the tail, close enough to feel the rear suspension vibrate; orange dock lights smear across the wet body panels. Shot 03 (0:04-0:07) A truck reverses unexpectedly across the lane, forcing the rider into a tight swerve through a narrow gap between a forklift and container corner. Shot 04 (0:07-0:10) The path cuts under a crane arm and through hanging chains, with droplets and sparks flicking off the speeder as it scrapes the edge of a steel barrier. Shot 05 (0:10-0:13) The camera pulls ahead for a front three-quarter angle as the rider exits the dock maze and skims beside open black water, city lights flickering across the surface. Shot 06 (0:13-0:15) One final bend reveals the full harbor skyline behind the rider; the speeder shoots down the pier into mist and sodium glow.

description: An extremely detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a diver's terrifying descent through a flooded subterranean megastructure, pursued by a colossal, eyeless leviathan, culminating in the diver firing a harpoon and bursting through the surface into a vast underground ocean.
content: A flooded subterranean megastructure, ancient stone corridors  half-submerged in black water, bioluminescent algae pulsing  along the walls like a heartbeat. A masked diver in scarred  tactical gear, lit by a flickering wrist-mounted flare, is  pulled downward through collapsing flooded chambers by the  current of a colossal eyeless leviathan moving beneath the  floor grates. The camera plunges after the diver as water  rushes through shattering stone archways, air bubbles and  debris spiraling past the lens. The diver grabs a broken  pillar to stop herself, the current ripping at her body, then  releases and freefalls through a vertical shaft, twisting to  dodge the leviathan's translucent tendrils whipping upward  through the darkness. Quick shaky frames catch her igniting  a harpoon gun mid-fall, the flare illuminating the creature's  massive jaw opening below. In the final movement, the camera  spirals downward around her as she fires the harpoon into the  creature's mouth, the bioluminescence erupts blinding white,  and the camera bursts through the surface of a vast  underground ocean, the diver silhouetted against the glow of  a thousand pulsing organisms on a cathedral-sized cavern  ceiling. 15 seconds..

title: Realistic Yoga Sequence Video Prompt for Seedance 2.0
description: A highly detailed, two-part Seedance 2.0 prompt for generating a realistic, cinematic 30-second video of a woman performing a yoga sequence. The prompt specifies the style (hyper-realistic, 8K, 35mm), lighting, setting, specific yoga poses (Warrior II, Downward Dog, Plank, Eight-Limb Pose, Upward Dog, Forward Fold, Chair Pose), camera movements, and physical details like muscle tension and sweat.
content:
段落1：
写实风格，超现实细节，电影级真实感，8K，35mm镜头，浅景深，柔和自然日光，室内明亮瑜伽练习室，木质地板，落地窗洒入晨光，背景干净简约， 女人皮肤自然光泽，专注平静的表情，长发扎成低马尾， 15秒视频，时长精确控制： [0-4秒] 她从站姿开始，缓慢进入战士二式，前腿弯曲，后腿伸直，双手平展，目光望向前手，核心收紧，肩膀放松，呼吸深长，相机从侧面45度缓慢推进 [4-9秒] 流畅过渡到下犬式，臀部向上抬起，双手双脚撑地呈倒V形，脊柱拉长，脚跟尽量贴地，头部自然下垂，相机从侧面跟随运动轨迹，再轻微环绕 [9-15秒] 进入平板支撑（Plank）后慢慢下沉到八支式，再推起进入上犬式，胸腔打开，肩膀后展，最后回到下犬式收尾，相机从低角度仰拍强调力量与延展，动作连贯有力，肌肉线条自然显现，皮肤真实纹理与汗珠微光，物理模拟真实，布料自然跟随身体运动，无任何变形，保持面部与体型全程一致，高细节写实，电影级光影与景深上身参考图

段落2：
将视频1延长15秒。写实风格，超现实细节，电影级真实感，8K，35mm镜头，浅景深，柔和自然日光，室内明亮瑜伽练习室，木质地板，落地窗洒入晨光，背景干净简约， 女人皮肤自然光泽，表情羞涩，脸蛋微红，略有汗珠，长发扎成低马尾， 15秒视频，时长精确控制： [15-21秒] 从下犬式跳步或步行向前进入前屈站立（Uttanasana），双脚并拢或微开，双手触地或抱小腿，脊柱完全前折，头部靠近膝盖前方，腿部后侧拉伸明显，相机从侧面低角度（地面附近）缓慢从左侧推向右侧，捕捉脊柱圆弧、臀部向上微抬与大腿后侧紧实线条，汗珠顺着后腰向臀部上方自然滑落 [21-26秒] 吸气半前屈（Ardha Uttanasana），双手撑于胫骨或地面，胸腔前推打开，脊柱延展，目光向前上方，髋部微后推保持后腿拉伸，相机从正面偏低45度缓慢上移，镜头高度从膝盖升至胸线，强调胸廓前展、腹部收紧与锁骨处光影，布料在胸腹轻微拉伸形成自然褶 [26-30秒] 呼气完全前屈（Uttanasana）后，吸气双手扫起进入椅式（Utkatasana），膝盖深屈，臀部向后坐，双手向上伸展，核心全力收紧，大腿前侧与臀部肌肉明显发力，背部保持平直，相机从右侧前低45度缓慢环绕至正前方极低角度（接近脚部高度），镜头跟随手臂上举轨迹，同时前推使双脚脚掌朝向镜头，脚趾自然张开伸展抓住地面以稳固平衡，捕捉大腿前侧与臀部发力时的体积感、脚背汗珠微光与脚趾张开的细节张力。 整体视频：动作连贯有力，肌肉线条自然显现，皮肤真实纹理与汗珠微光，物理模拟真实，布料自然跟随身体运动，无任何变形，保持面部与体型全程一致，高细节写实，电影级光影与景深

title: Explorer discovering a hidden valley in the snow
description: A highly detailed, multi-shot cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing an explorer's journey through a vast, silent snowscape, culminating in the discovery of a hidden, warm valley, utilizing specific camera cuts and emotional cues.
content: Live-action cinematic sequence in real time. Aerial wide shot: a vast white mountain range, completely silent and endless. Cut to close-up of a compass in a gloved hand, needle spinning then settling. Cut to medium shot of a lone explorer trudging through deep snow, wind whipping around her. Cut to insert shot of footprints in the snow being erased by the wind almost immediately. Cut to extreme close-up of her face behind snow goggles — determined. Cut to wide shot of her stopping at the edge of a cliff, looking out. Cut to POV shot: an enormous hidden valley below, completely untouched, green and warm despite the snow above. Cut to tracking shot circling her slowly as she takes in the view. Cut to close-up of her hand pulling out a weathered journal and opening it. Cut to insert shot of a sketch in the journal — the exact valley she is now looking at, drawn decades ago. Cut to extreme close-up of her eyes: disbelief turning into triumph. Cut to final aerial wide shot pulling back slowly: she stands tiny at the cliff edge, the hidden valley vast and glowing below her.

title: Surreal Sky Ocean Battle: Whale vs. Kraken
description: A detailed, multi-section prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second cinematic sequence featuring a colossal sky-whale battling a kraken made of storm clouds in a surreal ocean floating in the sky at sunset. The prompt includes specific choreography, velocity ramping, camera movements, and photorealistic style constraints.
content:
Environment:

A surreal ocean in the sky where enormous waves float between cloud layers. Waterfalls spill endlessly downward into the clouds below while golden sunset light illuminates the horizon.

Action:

15.0s sequence. A colossal sky-whale made of shimmering water currents glides through the floating ocean waves. Rising from the clouds below, a massive kraken formed from swirling storm clouds and lightning tendrils attacks.

They collide as the kraken’s tentacles wrap around the whale while both creatures crash through floating waves.

Velocity Ramp choreography: the whale’s massive tail strike slows to reveal suspended droplets and lightning arcs before detonating outward as the motion resumes.

Camera:

title: Impossible Golf Shot Tracking in a Rainstorm
description: A complex prompt designed to test video models' ability to track a small, fast-moving object (a golf ball) through extreme weather and dynamic camera movement, which Seedance 2.0 successfully executed.
content:
A dramatic sports sequence begins on a lush, windswept coastal cliff during a violent rainstorm. A golfer in bright yellow rain gear stands on the tee box, gripping a driver. His stance is planted firmly, eyes locked on a distant green across a churning ocean cove.

As he swings, the clubhead connects with a resounding crack, launching the dimpled white ball into the stormy sky. The camera immediately accelerates and locks onto the golf ball mid-flight.

The camera tracks directly behind the spinning sphere, maintaining perfect alignment as it cuts through the driving rain. The ocean waves and dark clouds become a streaking motion blur while the ball remains sharp and centered.

The howling wind roars as the projectile travels straight and true. The manicured green grows rapidly larger. In the final seconds, the camera closes in tightly as the ball strikes the turf. End on an extreme close-up of the ball ripping through the wet grass, throwing up a spray of dirt before dropping perfectly into the cup.

title: City Time Freeze Cinematic Sequence
description: A detailed 15-second cinematic prompt involving a girl freezing a city street in time using a shockwave, with specific camera and lighting details.
content: Cinematic ultra-realistic 15-second short film, western girl in a dark jacket walking through a busy city sidewalk, natural daylight, hard shadows, shallow depth of field, shot on Arri Alexa Mini, 50mm lens. She walks confidently through moving pedestrians, phones, conversations, and pigeons flying in a bright sky. She snaps her fingers — a white spherical shockwave expands outward, freezing everything instantly: people mid-step, dust and leaves suspended, pigeons frozen mid-flight. Silence. She calmly walks through the frozen world, observing everything, gently touching a suspended pigeon. She stops in front of a fully clothed woman in a flowing red dress frozen mid-motion, studies her with a calm expression. She then snaps again — a stronger reverse shockwave restores motion across the city. Pedestrians resume walking, pigeons scatter into flight, leaves fall naturally. She turns and walks away as the camera pulls back into a wide cinematic aerial shot. Fade out.

title: Cinematic Title Animation Prompt: 'Slaying Immortals' (Zhan Xian)
description: A highly detailed, multi-stage prompt designed for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video animation of the title '斩仙' (Slaying Immortals) in a powerful, ice-jade, and ink-wash style. The prompt meticulously describes the visual effects, timing, sound effects, color grading (cyan-blue), and technical parameters (motion intensity 0.75, effect intensity 0.85) across five distinct 3-second segments, from chaotic beginning to final static display.
content: 0-3秒：混沌初开，玉意潜涌画面从绝对纯黑开始，无任何光源。随着低沉的玉磬声与冰裂音效响起，画面中心开始浮现极淡的青蓝色粒子流，如深海暗流般缓慢汇聚，形成一道若有若无的环形光带，光带边缘伴随细碎的冰晶飞溅特效，粒子密度逐渐提升，营造出“冰封千年”的压迫感。 3-6秒：墨意破局，笔意初现粒子流突然加速，从环形光带中爆发出一道贯穿画面的凌厉青蓝光刃，如天罚之剑瞬间撕裂黑暗。蓝光所过之处，“斩”字的左侧偏旁以水墨泼洒的方式快速成型，笔画边缘带有锋利的冰刃锯齿光效，墨色由深黑渐变为冰蓝，笔画内部流动着细碎的玉质反光粒子，整体呈现出“墨刃破冰”的动态张力。 6-9秒：仙意凝形，字体渐成“斩”字成型后，画面下方爆发出第二道更具冲击力的蓝光，从画面底部向上延伸，“仙”字的竖笔以“玉柱擎天”的姿态骤然成型，笔锋锐利如冰刃，末端带有冰晶星屑飞溅特效。“仙”字的横画与撇画以水墨拖尾的方式从竖笔中衍生而出，笔画边缘伴随青蓝色的能量涟漪，整体呈现出“仙意凝形、玉质天成”的视觉效果，两个字的笔画在黑暗中相互呼应,形成强烈的视觉平衡。 9-12秒：锋芒毕露，特效叠加“斩仙”二字完全成型后，字体表面开始浮现出流动的青蓝色辉光，辉光从笔画中心向边缘扩散，形成“玉气环绕”的动态效果。同时，画面中开始飘落细碎的冰晶与墨色粒子，粒子在字体周围旋转、碰撞，产生短暂的冰爆特效，字体边缘的锯齿光效逐渐强化，整体亮度提升30%,背景由纯黑渐变为冰蓝水墨纹理，营造出“锋芒毕露、仙意凛然”的冲击力。 12-15秒：定格终局，余韵悠长所有动态特效逐渐收敛，“斩仙”二字的辉光稳定为柔和的青蓝色，粒子流停止流动，冰晶缓缓飘落至画面底部消失。最终定格为：冰蓝水墨纹理背景下，“斩仙”二字以厚重书法字体呈现，左侧“斩”字笔锋凌厉如冰刃，右侧“仙”字竖笔挺拔如玉柱，字体边缘带有细微的玉质光晕，整体呈现出“斩仙问道、玉意长存”的终局效果。 技术参数补充(Seedance 2.0适配)运动强度：0.75(保证丝滑过渡，避免过度抖动)特效强度：0.85(强化水墨粒子与冰玉特效的视觉冲击力)色彩校正：青蓝色主色调，辅以墨黑与暗红点缀，对比度提升20%镜头语言：全程固定镜头，聚焦画面中心，无运镜变化，突出字体本身的动态张力

title: Goblin traveller and steed in the mountains
description: A detailed, multi-scene prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a cinematic video of a goblin traveller and his mountain boar steed crossing a snow-covered ridge.
content: A rugged mountain traveller crosses a snow-covered ridge under a cold, overcast sky. Wind carries light snowfall across the frame. His heavy boots press into fresh snow and scattered stone. The camera tracks low and slightly behind, capturing texture, atmosphere, and drifting frost. Nearby stands a large mountain boar used as a pack animal. Thick bristles catch the wind. Its back is fitted with secured travel supplies: bundled blankets, rope coils, wooden containers, and strapped gear that gently shifts with movement. The traveller reaches the animal, grips the saddle frame, and climbs onto its back in one smooth, practical motion. He leans forward slightly and guides it with a light cue. The boar begins moving down a narrow mountain path. The camera widens as they descend steadily through mist and falling snow, cliffs rising on either side, the valley fading into grey distance.

title: Cozy Nighttime Pet Secret Short Film
description: An extremely detailed, cinematic prompt for a 15-second short film featuring a cat and a dog secretly using phones at night. The prompt specifies the style (hyper-realistic CG, documentary quality), lighting (warm/cool contrast), setting, and a precise six-shot storyboard with camera angles and character actions.
content:
【风格】 超写实电影感 CG，真实宠物纪录片质感，温馨治愈风格，毛发物理模拟真实，细节清晰，8K画质，柔和暖色调，夜晚室内氛围
【时长】 15秒 【场景设定】 真实温馨卧室，门关闭状态，夜晚环境，主灯关闭，仅床头台灯发出暖黄色微光，房间整体偏暗。 床上有被子，两只宠物露出头部。
🎞 分镜设计（含景别 + 景深 + 光源逻辑）
0–3秒 【景别】中景（Medium Shot） 【运镜】轻微缓慢推进 【景深】浅景深，背景虚化
【画面】 一只胖橘猫和一只可爱柴犬坐在床上，被子盖到脖子。 两只分别拿着手机看。 手机屏幕光很亮，冷色光照在脸上。 床头台灯发出暖光，与手机冷光形成对比。 两只宠物笑嘻嘻地盯着屏幕。
3–6秒 【景别】特写（Close-up） 【运镜】轻微手持感 【景深】极浅景深 【画面】 橘猫耳朵突然竖起。 表情从开心变得警觉。 手机光在脸上闪动。
6–8秒 【景别】近景 【动作】 橘猫迅速按灭手机。 冷色手机光消失。 房间只剩暖色台灯光。 橘猫钻进被窝，只露出一小撮毛。
8–10秒 【景别】中近景 【动作】 橘猫从被窝里悄悄伸出一只小爪子，轻轻戳了戳柴犬。 柴犬愣一下。 迅速关手机。 冷光消失。 钻进被窝，闭眼装睡。
10–13秒 【景别】门口远景 【运镜】固定镜头 【景深】深景深 【画面】 卧室门缓缓打开一条缝。 一个金毛的头探进来。 光线从走廊微弱溢入。 金毛审视床上的两只。
13–15秒 【景别】金毛特写 【动作】 金毛满意地点头。 轻轻关门。 画面回到床上，两只宠物紧闭双眼。 柴犬偷偷睁开一只眼睛。 黑场结束。
💡 关键生成强化词（建议加入） realistic fur simulation subtle breathing movement soft shadow transition warm and cool light contrast cinematic lighting natural micro expression quiet nighttime ambience cozy bedroom atmosphere

content:
【风格】
90年代香港电视剧风格(90s HK TV Drama Style)，复古胶片颗粒感(Vintage Film Grain)，高对比度暖黄色调(Warm Yellowish Tone)，广角镜头夸张透视，情绪极度歇斯底里，混乱、嘈杂、绝望。

【场景】
1990年代香港证券交易所大厅，满地废纸，电子屏一片惨绿（港股跌是绿色/或用红色表示危机，视生成模型理解，建议写"Plummeting Numbers"）。

【角色】
主角（The Speculator）：身穿90年代宽肩灰色西装，发型凌乱，满头大汗，眼神充满了血丝和疯狂，手里紧紧攥着一个“大哥大”手提电话(Brick Phone)。

【分镜详解】
[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：大崩盘·疯魔时刻
画面：广角怼脸特写。主角站在交易大厅中央，周围是模糊的奔跑和尖叫的人群。
动作：他对着“大哥大”声嘶力竭地怒吼，青筋暴起，唾沫横飞。
【台词/字幕】：“不要怕！技术性调整！给我加杠杆！”（疯魔感拉满）。
氛围：背景的电子显示屏数字疯狂跳动，红绿光影交错，营造出一种令人窒息的紧迫感。

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：一瞬间·天台的风
画面：快速剪辑(Jump Cut)。镜头突然切换到空旷的大楼天台边缘。
动作：主角背对镜头，西装外套被扔在一边，领带松垮。狂风吹乱他的头发和衬衫。他手里攥着一张揉烂的股票凭证，身体摇摇欲坠。
氛围：从极度的吵闹瞬间转为极度的死寂(Deafening Silence)，只有呼啸的风声。

[00:05-00:15] 镜头3：梦一场·废纸漫天
画面：仰拍镜头。
动作：主角松开手，无数白色的股票废纸像雪花一样从天台上飘落，洒向繁华却冷漠的中环街道。
特写：镜头最后定格在他绝望空洞的眼神（瞳孔失去高光），脸上划过一滴悔恨的泪水。
【字幕（黄色复古字体）】：股市有风险，入市需谨慎。

title: Serene Luxury Spa Visual
description: A cinematic video prompt for a serene, editorial-style sequence set in a luxury bathroom, using a reference image for character consistency.
content: Cinematic 15-second visual set in a luxurious marble bathroom with warm golden ambient lighting reflecting softly across water and glass. A woman reclines in a foam-filled bathtub, calm and composed. The camera begins with a slow side-profile close-up as she gently looks away. Movement is smooth and unhurried, with soft slow-motion as her fingers glide across the water surface, creating delicate ripples. Seamless transition into an overhead shot showing symmetry and stillness. Cut to a soft push-in through a blurred glass foreground, keeping her face in gentle focus. Final moment: extreme close-up as her eyes slowly close while light subtly flickers across her skin. Ultra-realistic, cinematic, smooth transitions, no sharp cuts, dreamy pacing, editorial style, intimate and serene mood

title: Wuxia Swordsman Duel Prompt
description: A highly detailed, cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a Wuxia-style audiovisual blockbuster featuring a duel between two swordsmen in a bamboo forest, focusing on camera movement, atmosphere, and ultra-slow motion effects during the clash.
content: A Wuxia-style audiovisual blockbuster. A white-clad swordsman and a straw-caped blademaster face off in a bamboo forest. The camera slowly pushes in between them, shifting focus between raindrops and sword hilts. The atmosphere is extremely oppressive; only the sound of rain can be heard. Suddenly, a crack of thunder flashes, and both charge simultaneously. A fast-panning profile shot captures their mud-splattering footsteps. The precise moment their weapons clash, the footage switches to ultra-slow motion, clearly displaying the ring-shaped shockwaves of rainwater blasted away by the blades, along with bamboo leaves sliced by sword aura. Normal speed resumes as they land back-to-back. The straw-caped blademaster's bamboo hat splits open, and the scene cuts abruptly.

title: Turbulent Sea Galleon Cinematic Prompt
description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0 describing a dynamic camera sequence starting high above a turbulent emerald sea, swooping down to a galleon, passing seamlessly through a stained-glass window into a still cabin, and then exiting back into the night sky.
content: A turbulent emerald sea crashing under the pale light of a crescent moon. A majestic 18th-century galleon rides the roaring waves, sails billowing. The camera swoops down from the storm clouds like a falcon, rushing over the choppy water. The ornate stern of the ship grows huge, featuring intricate stained-glass windows framing the captain's quarters. Matching the ship's violent rocking, the camera passes seamlessly through a glass pane into a surprisingly still, candle-lit cabin. A colorful macaw sleeps quietly on a hanging brass perch, undisturbed by the storm. The camera glides past the bird and exits seamlessly through a side porthole. It sweeps high into the night sky, the massive ship reduced to a toy on the water. The sound of crashing waves fades to silence.

title: 10-Second Spring Festival Gala Talk Show: Zhen Huan and Hu Fei
description: A detailed 10-second script prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a video in the style of a Spring Festival Gala skit, featuring characters Zhen Huan and Hu Fei from a historical drama in a modern talk show setting. The prompt specifies scene setup, character costumes (museum-grade Qing Dynasty robes), modern props (Bluetooth headset, tablet), camera work (OTS shots, full stage view), and a high-saturation red/gold festive visual style.
content: 10 秒春晚风格舞台表演：“甄嬛与扈绯脱口秀”  0–2 秒： 双人中景。 舞台整体是“客厅小品”设定，但周围是宏大的红金配色 LED 屏幕。 甄嬛（左）和扈绯（右）并排坐在现代脱口秀沙发上。 关键历史准确性要求：两人都穿着华丽、界限分明的清代宫廷长袍，带有立领和精细刺绣；发型是地道的“大拉翅”或“点翠”，带有流苏装饰。 扈绯显得很随性，拿着一根酱黄瓜在咬，手指戴着长长的金护甲。  2–4 秒： 镜头切换到过肩视角 (OTS)，聚焦在扈绯。 扈绯夸张地翻了个白眼（经典的“翻白眼”表情）。 她用长护甲捏着咸菜，一边指指点点，一边用傲慢的语气说话（对口型）： “今年的 KPI 又是打这帮小妖精，那老头儿皇上懂什么审美？”  4–6 秒： 迅速切换到甄嬛的过肩视角 (OTS)。 对比细节：甄嬛的一只耳朵戴着现代白色蓝牙耳机（与古代首饰形成强烈对比），手里拿着一台轻薄的平板电脑在滑动。 她冷静而专业地回应（对口型）： “姐姐莫气，这叫职场内卷。我正琢磨着辞职去卖‘真话水’（清凉油）呢。”  6–8 秒： 两人之间咖啡桌的特写。 一个现代塑料珍珠奶茶杯，上面印着“一丈红”（剧中著名的惩罚），放在一个传统的瓷瓶旁边。 镜头迅速切回两人。  8–10 秒： 舞台全景。 观众笑声效果（通过灯光变化/追光呈现）。 扈绯摆出最后的定格姿势：翘着腿，抬着下巴，再次翻白眼。 甄嬛对着镜头露出像新闻主播一样的专业微笑。 金色亮片从空中飘落。 节日红色气氛达到顶峰。  风格与氛围： **视觉：** 高饱和度的新年红金调 **服装：** 博物馆级的清朝宫廷服装（丝绸、精美刺绣、厚重头饰） **核心对比：** 正式的清宫礼仪 × 放松的职场/小品演员态度 **剪辑：** 节奏明快，笑点清晰，小品式剪辑 **长宽比：** 16:9

title: Cinematic 4K Military CGI Scene
description: A highly detailed, multi-segment prompt for a 15-second ultra-widescreen (2.35:1) cinematic video, focusing on a chaotic yet organized military convoy in a snowy battlefield. It specifies technical details like 4K CGI, 24fps, camera movements (close-up, pull-out, quick cut), realistic effects (muzzle flash, heat distortion, armor wear), and sound design, while prohibiting uniformity and watermarks.
content: 技术规格：2.35:1超宽幕，电影级原生画质，4K医学CGI细节，差异化建模，24fps。 0-3秒：以【@图片1】首帧。镜头大特写斗篷男子，他神情冷峻，隔着面罩大声用英文咆哮道：“All units, move out! Fire at will!”。他平举步枪，枪口喷射出极具颗粒感的蓝白色火舌，弹壳飞溅。注意枪托抵肩的真实震动，枪管上方因连续开火产生的高温热浪导致空气产生肉眼可见的折射畸变。 3-7秒：镜头快速向侧后方拉远。视角沿着【@图片1】甲车的斜向路径扩散，但不再是整齐阵列。浓烟中猛然显现出高低错落、型号完全不同的重型集群：有的载具是八轮驱动的步战车，有的载具带有巨大的雷达抛物面，有的载具是低矮的履带式坦克。所有车辆以不等距 的、散布式的战术姿态交错前进，每辆车的泥垢分布和装甲涂层均有显著差异。 7-12秒：特写快速切至一辆厚重的重型装甲车，士兵单手猛力推开沉重的金属舱门，舱门由于重量产生轻微的回弹颤动，士兵动作敏捷 地半蹲在舱内操作重机枪，眼神警惕地环视。侧后方一辆导弹车正斜向指天，导弹点火瞬间产生巨大的白色浓烟和红光，将载具周边的积雪瞬间震飞，坦克主炮开火时，炮口制退器喷出的黑烟与火光极具真实质感。 12-15秒：大远景俯瞰。这是一场混乱而有序的钢铁洪流，上百辆外形各异的先进载具在雪原上划出深浅不一、宽窄不同的履带压痕。车辆行驶在起伏不平的雪地上产生真实的颠簸晃动，车尾喷出的尾气浓度和黑烟各有不同。画面伴随低频的引擎重低音和远方不间断的爆炸闪光，充满了真实的战场压迫感。 音效：真实洪亮的英文口令，沉重的坦克炮轰鸣，导弹点火的嘶吼声，履带碾压坚冰的碎裂声，配合史诗感的战鼓配乐。 禁止：水印，字幕，整齐的方阵，重复的模型。

description: A detailed cinematic prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing a lone woman on a brutalist building at sunrise, featuring a complex camera movement from an aerial wide shot to a close profile, emphasizing cinematic lighting and film texture.

The camera begins in an extreme wide aerial shot, then slowly descends in a smooth spiraling orbit around her, tightening into a close profile as her eyes close and she breathes in. Dust particles float in the sunlight, lens flare streaks across the frame, subtle handheld vibration adds human fragility. Cinematic natural light, soft atmospheric diffusion, 35mm film texture, shallow depth of field, poetic realism. Avoid cartoon colors, avoid digital sharpness, avoid artificial CGI look.

title: Classical Wuxia Duel in Bamboo Forest
description: A prompt for a 10-second video generating a classical Eastern Wuxia scene in a bamboo forest. It specifies the aesthetic (emerald green, cinematic lighting, soft light beams), defines two characters (male in white, female in cyan), and details three shots: a wide shot establishing the scene with light movements, a slow-motion mid-shot of swords clashing, and a dynamic tracking shot emphasizing speed and flowing bamboo leaves.
content: 【画面风格】 东方古典武侠美学，电影感画面语言，竹林海景观，翡翠绿色主色调，光影层次丰富，林间可见柔和光束效果。 【角色定义】 1. 男侠客：身着素白长袍，身形稳健，动作简练有力。 2. 女侠客：身着青鸾色轻纱长裙，动作轻盈流畅，姿态灵动。 【视频时长】 10秒 【分镜脚本】 [00:00-00:03] 镜头1：远景构图（Wide Shot） 画面：高耸茂密的竹林顶部，云雾在林间缓慢流动。 动作：男侠客与女侠客分别立于高处竹影之间，身体姿态轻盈稳定，仿佛借助气流与竹势保持平衡。 细节表现：竹枝在微风中自然弯曲回弹，两人的身形随竹影产生细微起伏，呈现出写意化的轻功效果，画面整体安静而紧张。 [00:00-00:06] 镜头2：中景慢动作（Medium Shot, Slow Motion） 动作：两人几乎同时借势跃起，在空中交错而过。 交互表现：两道剑影在空中短暂交汇，形成一道明亮的光痕，周围竹叶被气流带动，缓慢旋转飘散。 视觉重点：叶片在空中翻飞，形成层次分明的前景与背景，动作流畅，没有夸张冲击。 [00:06-00:10] 镜头3：动态跟随镜头（Tracking Shot） 动作：女侠客在前方顺势滑行，衣袖掠过竹枝改变方向；男侠客在后方连续借力追随，步伐轻快有节奏。 环境反馈：摄像机平稳跟随移动，竹林在画面边缘形成自然的速度虚化效果。 视觉效果：每一次动作都会带起大片竹叶飞散，如叶雨般在画面中流动，增强空间纵深感与动势美感。 【画面技术要求】 电影级布光，色彩饱和但层次清晰，景深自然，画面稳定干净，整体呈现东方武侠的写意美感与空间张力。

description: A complex, continuous camera motion prompt for Seedance 2.0, describing an impossible 15-second shot where the camera is locked behind a single flaming arrow as it flies across a massive battlefield and crashes into a shield.
content: 15-second cinematic battle shot locked behind a single flaming arrow. A commander releases the arrow from a hilltop at sunset, and the camera instantly snaps behind it in extreme high-speed pursuit. The arrow cuts through smoke, over cavalry, between elephant armor plates, under falling debris from a siege tower, and through crossing volleys of spears and banners. The battlefield blurs into streaks while the arrow remains sharp. In the final seconds, it crashes into a shield at the exact moment two infantry lines collide, dust and splinters exploding across frame. title: Underground City 'ARC' Tour VFX Prompt
description: A highly detailed, time-coded VFX prompt for Seedance 2.0 to create a 15-second cinematic tour of a fictional underground city called 'ARC'. It specifies camera movements, visual effects (a door opening, glass shattering into light particles), and the final reveal of a vast, multi-layered city illuminated by neon and bioluminescent plants, ending with a data display and whiteout.
content:
【シネマティック・ロケーションVFX：15秒】

[0-3秒]:
POV（主観視点）で、@image1にある古びた地下扉 がゆっくりと開く。
扉の隙間から、冷たいコンクリートの質感とは正反対の、温かく鮮やかな「ネオンゴールド」の光が溢れ出す。

[3-7秒]:
カメラが扉をくぐり抜ける瞬間、動画 [[1000010059.mp4]] のように、周囲の壁がガラスのように「バキバキ」と音を立てて粉々に砕け散る。
砕けた破片が光の粒子に変わる中、視界が一気に開け、地下数百メートルまで続く広大な空洞（スーパー・シェルター）が現れる。

[7-12秒]:
カメラが空中に放り出されたかのように、地下都市の上空をダイナミックに滑空する。
そこには数千人が暮らす多層構造の街があり、巨大なジオデシック・ドームの中には本物の森や川が流れ、空中を無数の個人用ドローンが飛び交っている。
街全体が「未来的なネオン」と「発光植物（Bioluminescent plants）」の光で幻想的に彩られている。

[12-15秒]:
画面端にスタイリッシュなUIで「ARC CITY: SECTOR 7 - POPULATION 50,000」とデータが表示される。
カメラが街の全景を捉える中、中央に「START YOUR NEW LIFE」の文字が浮かび上がり、まばゆいホワイトアウトで終了。

設定詳細:8k解像度、フォトリアル、ボリュームレンダリング、映画的なモーションブラー、ダイナミックなカメラワーク。

title: Japanese SWAT Team Hostage Scenario Cinematic Script
description: A multi-shot cinematic script prompt for Seedance 2.0, detailing a hostage situation involving the Japanese Special Assault Team (SAT). The script specifies camera angles, character dialogue, lighting, and sound effects across four distinct shots, from a low-angle tactical advance to the aftermath of the resolution.
content:
[Shot 1: Low-Angle Tactical Advance]
薄暗い廃工場内部。
カメラは床すれすれのローアングル。
画面奥から、黒い装備に身を包んだ警視庁特殊急襲部隊（SAT）の隊員がゆっくり前進してくる。
フェイスシールド越しに鋭い視線。
無線のかすれた音。
隊員（低く抑えた声）
「武器を捨てろ。もう逃げ場はない。」
※銃は構えているが、カメラには向けない。

[Shot 2: Lateral Hostage Frame]
横からのサイド構図。
容疑者は作業用タンクトップ姿、汗まみれ。
片腕で女性を羽交い締めにし、拳銃をこめかみに押し当てている。
背景は割れた窓から差し込む逆光。
容疑者（取り乱しながら）
「近づくな！撃つぞ！本当に撃つからな！」
女性は涙をこらえ、呼吸が荒い。

[Shot 3: Extreme Close-Up – Trigger Moment]
隊員の指とトリガーの極端なクローズアップ。
手袋越しにわずかな震え。
一瞬、環境音が消える。
容疑者（画面外）
「やるぞ！！」
銃声は画面外で響く。

[Shot 4: Aftermath Wide Shot]
静まり返る空間。
固定カメラのワイドショット。
容疑者は床に倒れ、拳銃は滑って離れている。
女性はその場に崩れ落ちるが無事。
SAT隊員がゆっくり接近し、安全確認。
隊員
「確保。救急要請。」

title: Dramatic Identity Reversal Short Drama
description: A detailed, time-coded Seedance 2.0 prompt for a 15-second dramatic short video about a wealthy young master trying to dismiss a woman with 5 million yuan, only for her to reveal her true identity as the major shareholder acquiring his family's company, featuring specific dialogue, camera shots, and sound effects for maximum dramatic impact.
content:
画面（0-5秒）： 奢华宴会厅中心，特写男主（豪门少爷，嚣张跋扈）正搂着女配（娇弱白莲花），不耐烦地将一张黑卡扔在地上，卡片滑到女主脚边。女主穿着看似朴素的礼服，低头看着卡，面无表情。周围是宾客嘲讽的嘴脸（快速蒙太奇剪辑）。 台词1（男主，嫌弃且高傲）： 拿着这五百万滚出沈家！像你这种身份低微的女人，根本不配站在这里碍我的眼！

画面（6-10秒）： 女主没有捡卡，而是缓缓抬起头，眼神瞬间变得凌厉深邃。她打了一个响指。宴会厅大门轰然打开，两排黑衣保镖迅速涌入，分开人群。一位西装革履的财团特助快步走到女主面前，九十度深深鞠躬，双手奉上一份文件。 台词2（财团特助，无比恭敬）： 大小姐，收购沈氏集团的合同已经准备好了，请您过目。

画面（11-15秒）： 男主和女配的表情瞬间凝固，瞳孔地震，男主惊恐地后退一步差点跌倒。女主接过文件看都没看一眼，直接甩在男主僵硬的胸口，文件散落一地。女主越过男主，走向主位，留下一个霸气侧影。 台词3（女主，冷艳且蔑视）： 沈少爷，现在破产的是你。这五百万，留着给你自己买棺材吧。

音效： 开场喧闹的宴会背景音，黑卡扔在地上的清脆声响；中段大门打开的震撼音效，整齐的脚步声；后段极具压迫感的BGM骤然响起，文件甩在身上的闷响，男主倒吸凉气的声音，女主高跟鞋离去的哒哒声。

时长： 精准15秒（身份惊天反转，极致打脸，爽点密集爆发）

title: Chinese Success Seminar (Chicken Soup) Video Prompt
description: A highly detailed, three-shot prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second video mimicking the style of a frantic, brainwashing Chinese success seminar. The prompt specifies the style (shaky handheld camera, warm stage lighting, huge gold PPT text), the character (a sweating, intense middle-aged 'Master'), and three dramatic scenes involving shouting, pacing, and a climactic kneeling pose.
content:
【风格】中国式成功学演讲，疯狂洗脑风，情绪炸裂，手持晃动镜头，暖色舞台聚光灯，背景是大金字PPT。
【时长】15秒
【角色】大师：中年男子，大背头油光锃亮，穿得像个新郎官(紧身西装)，戴着耳麦，满头大汗，脖子上青筋暴起。
【场景】千人酒店会议厅，台下乌压压的人头。

[00:00-00:05] 镜头1：灵魂拷问(The Question)。
特写/怼脸拍。大师面目狰狞，手指几乎戳到镜头上，唾沫星子横飞。
动作：他猛地扯掉领带，瞪大眼睛看着你。
【台词/咆哮】：“告诉我！你甘心吗？你甘心这辈子就拿着三千块的死工资吗？回答我！！”

[00:05-00:10] 镜头2：底层逻辑(The Logic)。
中景/舞台游走。大师在舞台上疯狂踱步，挥舞着手臂，像是在指挥千军万马。
背景：PPT上写着巨大的红字：“狼性！认知！裂变！”
【台词/嘶吼】：“穷人洗澡，富人洗脑！你为什么不成功？因为你的头脑里装的全是垃圾！把你的退路给我断了！！”

[00:10-00:15] 镜头3：高潮收割(The Climax)。
全景/升格慢动作。大师猛地单膝跪地，双手高举指向天空，BGM激昂炸裂。
台下观众：疯狂起立，鼓掌，甚至有人热泪盈眶。
【台词/金句】：“今晚，让我们一起，改写命运！要想富，先脱裤（脱离舒适的裤子）！听懂掌声！！！”

title: High Society Drama: Real Heiress Revenge Prompt
description: A text-to-video prompt for Seedance 2.0 to generate a 15-second short drama about high society feuds, featuring a 'real vs. fake heiress' trope. The scene is a luxurious banquet where the fake heiress attempts a manipulative trick, only to be exposed by the real heiress with a DNA test and dramatically reclaiming her position as the 'Queen.'
content: 【风格】豪门恩怨（High Society），真假千金梗，极致反转，撕绿茶爽文，高定礼服，美艳御姐风。 【时长】15秒 【角色】真千金（烈焰红唇，黑天鹅晚礼服，气场两米八）VS 假千金（小白花装扮，楚楚可怜，眼泪汪汪）。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：绿茶演技（The Trap）。 奢华宴会厅。假千金故意摔碎一个古董花瓶，跌坐在碎片中，捂着手背哭得梨花带雨。周围宾客指指点点。 【动作】假千金指着真千金，眼神却在偷笑。 【对白口型指导】“姐姐，我知道你讨厌我抢了你的位置，但这个是奶奶的遗物啊！” [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：证据打脸（The Slapback）。 真千金冷笑一声，完全不慌。她从手包里慢条斯理地掏出一份文件（DNA鉴定书），直接甩在假千金脸上。纸张散落，特写镜头给到鉴定结果（红色大字：无血缘关系）。 【动作】真千金居高临下，眼神蔑视。 【对白口型指导】“演够了吗？野种。” [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：女王加冕（The Coronation）。 全场宾客倒吸一口凉气（震惊脸）。真千金无视地上的假千金，径直走向主位的宝座，一把扯下假千金头上的皇冠戴在自己头上。 【动作】她整理裙摆坐下，霸气侧漏。假千金面如死灰，被保安拖走。 【对白口型指导】“这是我家，滚。”

title: Zelda: Breath of the Wild - Temple Awakening Cinematic Prompt

The prompt specifies a blend of cel-shading and watercolor, cold blue-green tones, camera movements, and sound design for the awakening of a hero in a temple.
content:
16:9横屏，赛璐璐渲染结合水彩晕染的奇幻冒险游戏画面风格，蓝绿冷色调为主暖光点缀，15秒古代遗迹探索。
0-4秒：黑暗中一双眼睛缓缓睁开，湛蓝色的瞳孔映出蓝色光芒，镜头拉远，一个金发少年躺在一个发光的石质祭
坛上缓缓坐起，四周是幽暗的古代石室，墙壁上布满发出幽蓝荧光的神秘纹路图案，纹路如同电路般向四方延伸
脉动闪烁，水滴从石壁上滴落回声悠远；5-9秒：少年赤脚踩上冰冷的石板地面，走向石室尽头一扇巨大的石门

title: Realistic Chinese Talk Show Prompt
description: A comprehensive prompt for creating a 15-second realistic video of a young Chinese woman giving a talk show monologue. It includes specific visual details, facial movement constraints for professional lip-syncing, a full script about financial value, and cinematic editing instructions including audience reactions.
content:
任务： 生成15秒中文脱口秀视频。
1. 视觉特征： 一位漂亮的中国年轻女孩，面部和身材特征参考图，真人实拍风格，皮肤白皙，身材匀称。穿白色泡泡袖褶皱衫、高腰牛仔短裤、白色厚底鞋。舞台中心，垂直聚光灯，深色剧场背景，8K电影级写实画质。
2. 动态与脚本： 步态优雅且精准。关键点：说话时面部上半部分几乎静止，仅嘴唇随台词开合，保持职业冷感微笑。
台词： “你不用给我情绪价值，请直接上价值。只要价值到位了，情绪我自己能控制。我和人过不去，我还能跟钱过不去吗？人为什么情绪总是不稳定？那是由于价值不稳定。主打就是：花谁的钱，听谁的话；没花你钱，请少说话。”
3. 声音与剪辑： 声音清脆如职业主持，语速均匀，字正腔圆，带有一种理性的压迫感。剪辑节奏： 金句点后插入0.5秒观众（男女皆有）爆笑和鼓掌的特写镜头。镜头在女孩独白时进行缓慢的推焦特写，强化视觉冲击。

人物面部参考@【@图1】暖光斜照车内，24mm焦距，f1.8大光圈，ISO100，快门速度1/50s，浅景深虚化背景。

9-15秒，她转身看向窗外是油菜花田，沉浸在春日的美好氛围中。
